task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Chevrolet Silverado (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $37000.00 and wholesale is $29040.00. Product features: Full-size pickup with multi-flex tailgate and available 2.7L turbo engine. Reference: https://www.chevrolet.com/trucks/silverado/1500

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Chevrolet Silverado. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Chevrolet Silverado. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
